title: Monte Carlo — Portfolio Ruin (GBM)
subtitle: Geometric Brownian motion · 500 paths · simulated client-side

explainer.entry: This shows many possible market journeys over time. Most paths grow, but some dip badly — the share that falls through the floor is the "ruin" chance.
explainer.expert: A GBM ensemble of 500 paths. The fan shows the 5–95 and 25–75 percentile cones; the histogram is the terminal distribution. P(ruin) is the fraction breaching the barrier; 95% VaR is the 5th-percentile loss.
